name: project-documenter
description: Generate professional project documentation with draw.io architecture diagrams and Word (.docx) output with embedded images. Automatically discovers any project's technology stack and produces Markdown, diagrams, PNG exports, and a formatted Word document.

interface.shortDescription: Generate project summaries with architecture diagrams and Word output.
interface.longDescription: Project-agnostic documentation agent that scans a repository, generates draw.io architecture diagrams, writes a Markdown summary, and converts it to a Word document with embedded PNG images.
defaultPrompt: Document this repository with architecture diagrams and a Word document.
Generate draw.io diagrams for this project and summarize the architecture.
Create docs/project-summary.md and docs/project-summary.docx for this codebase.
